scope.target: REL-001 cold-start release controls and the owner-required PKG-003 v0.4.2 automatic-source reinforcement
constraints: Authored notes never contain rendered provenance
Separate local deterministic and hosted public-state evidence
Bind v0.4.2 by its exact immutable package inventory and prove a real extracted upgrade

steps: Create placeholder-only release templates and validator
Implement pre-tag dry-run and explicit tag interface
Implement local and hosted terminal-state validation
Wire REL command into governance CI
Add the owner-required exact v0.4.2 automatic source and real extracted upgrade
execution.last_completed_step: Implemented the release mechanics and planned v0.5.0 sources, then completed the owner-required PKG-003 expansion. All four real extracted source upgrades and the complete 33/33 source critical gate pass; the four-source candidate body renders without authored-source provenance leakage.
execution.next_action: Commit the REL-001 mechanics and planned four-source candidate as a coherent checkpoint. Rebuild from the immutable commit, run the exact clean-state candidate gate, push, and obtain hosted plus independent evidence.

results.summary: Cold-start release mechanics and the planned four-source v0.5.0 artifacts are implemented. The owner-required v0.4.2 automatic route, all four real extracted upgrades, and the complete 33/33 source critical gate pass in the working tree.
tests_run: four-source extracted-package GWT including immutable v0.4.2 (1/1)
results.residual_risk: Immutable candidate, clean-state candidate gate, deterministic committed-tree package, hosted CI, independent assessment, and terminal public-state evidence remain pending.
